MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUN-08-2022 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON JUN-29-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. JANSHER RASA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. WENDY SKILLMAN, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL OF RECORD, ATTORNEY CODY LEJEUNE. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST TO CONTINUE TRIAL FOR 2 WEEKS SINCE PARTIES ARE CLOSE TO SETTLEMENT IS GRANTED WITH THE CONDITION THAT PLAINTIFF PAYS A $60.00 MOTION FEE FOR THE TRIAL CONTINUANCE, PAYABLE VIA E-FILING OR IN PERSON IN ROOM 103. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL HAS TO PAY $60.00 FROM THE PREVIOUS ORAL REQUEST ON 5/23/22 TO CONTINUE THE TRIA DATE. SANCTIONS IS IMPOSED ON DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY, CODY LEJEUNE IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE 6/27/22. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS SET ON JUN-29-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. IF THE CASE SETTLES, SANCTIONS WILL BE WAIVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. PARTIES TO NOTIFY THE COURT WITHIN 7-14 DAYS BEFORE TRIAL AND COMPLY WITH THE TRIAL ORDER. PARTIES WAIVED NOTICE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR MAY-23-2022 - JANSHER RASA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF IN PERSON WITH WITNESS. ANGEL (TEODOSIO) SANCHEZ, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT SET AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. CODY LEJEUNE (COUNSEL OF RECORD FOR DEFENDANT) FOR JUN-08-2022 IN DEPARTMENT 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANT'S ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE OVER PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTION WITH A CONTINUANCE FEE OF $60 TO BE PAID VIA E-FILING. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO JUN-08-2022 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR PARTIES TO TRY TO RESOLVE THE CASE. BOTH COUNSEL ORDERED TO APPEAR IN PERSON UNLESS CASE SETTLES. PLAINTIFF'S WITNESS MAY APPEAR VIRTUALLY. IF THE CASE SETTLES, THEN THE COURT WILL WAIVE THE $250.00 SANCTION AND VACATE THE OSC. PLAINTIFF TO GIVE NOTICE OF NEW TRIAL DATE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206)

MASTER CALENDAR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTORNEY CODY R. THIS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WILL BE DISCHARGED AND TAKEN OFF CALENDAR IF SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 ARE PAID PRIOR TO 6/27/22. IF THE CASE SETTLED, SANCTIONS WILL BE WAIVED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
